_comment: Source of truth for approval-engine thresholds. Edited automatically by scripts/weekly-threshold-tune.js (Sundays, auto-commit) and read by src/approval-engine.js at module load. If this file is missing or malformed, approval-engine.js falls back to its hardcoded defaults. Do not hand-edit during the week unless you also note it in tuning_history.

tuning_history.reason: Config file introduced; values mirror approval-engine.js @ 9cef33c. No tuning applied (14-day post-bugfix relearning window through ~6/17).
